title: Meta Company Overview
text: Meta Platforms, Inc. is a technology company focused on social connection, digital advertising, artificial intelligence, messaging, and immersive technologies. Its Family of Apps segment includes Facebook, Instagram, Messenger, WhatsApp, Threads, and other services used by billions of people. This segment generates most of Meta's revenue through advertising, including ad placements across feeds, Reels, Stories, search, messaging surfaces, and other formats. Meta's Reality Labs segment develops virtual reality, augmented reality, mixed reality, wearable devices, software, and content, including Meta Quest and AI glasses. The company is investing heavily in AI infrastructure, recommendation systems, generative AI, business tools, and future computing devices. For investment analysis, Meta is important because it combines a highly profitable advertising business with large AI and Reality Labs investments, while facing risks from regulation, privacy rules, competition, platform changes, content moderation, and high capital spending.
